notes: The province layer contains 34 province-level administrative units.
The second-level layer contains all province-mapped prefecture-level units from the vendored administrative snapshot, plus one municipality-equivalent unit for each direct-controlled municipality.
The second-level layer includes prefecture-level cities, autonomous prefectures, leagues, and prefectures; it is not limited to prefecture-level cities.
Taiwan, Hong Kong, and Macau remain in the province layer. The current logical second-level standard does not expose prefecture-level travel units for them.
County-level cities, districts, counties, and the national/root China view are excluded from statistics.
